Public post
Hello everyone,

If you have made your way here thank you so much!

I'm Fibaro and if you have found your way here you probably know what I do, this will be my new main page and I hope to treat you all with tons of new lovely stories as well as updates to your favourite ones.

Kind regards,
Fibaro
